title: stellaria hamiltoniana
intro: Stellaria hamiltoniana, also known as Hamilton's starwort, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Stellaria hamiltoniana can be prepared as a tea or infusate, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
